pr.title: Record: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + Causal SLOT-16 — val_bpb 1.0766 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines deep recurrent + parallel residual architecture with MuonEq-R and GPTQ int6 training, then evaluates via causal SLOT delta adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Evaluation adapts a causal SLOT delta per batch atop frozen model, but all training happens on the standard training set without val-shard training.
techniques: Depth recurrence + parallel residuals with MuonEq-R
GPTQ int6 plus Brotli/LZMA compression wrapper
Per-batch causal SLOT delta optimization during eval
